title: Auto-grant admin access to logged-in Internet Identity principal

requirements.summary: Update the frontend admin check flow so that after a user logs in with Internet Identity, the app immediately reflects their admin status without requiring a manual page refresh.
acceptanceCriteria: After Internet Identity login completes, the admin status query is re-fetched automatically
Admin navigation links and the admin panel become accessible without requiring a page reload
Non-admin users still see the AccessDeniedScreen when navigating to the admin panel

file_operations.description: After successful login completes, trigger query invalidation for admin status and user role queries to ensure the UI immediately reflects the current user's permissions. Use the authorization component's admin check capabilities to verify access. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Ensure the useIsCallerAdmin and useGetCallerUserRole hooks are configured to automatically refetch when the actor changes. Add queryClient.invalidateQueries calls for admin-related query keys when authentication state changes. Use the authorization component to support role-based access checks. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Update the navigation links to reactively show or hide admin panel links based on the real-time admin status from useIsCallerAdmin hook. Ensure the UI updates immediately after login without requiring a page refresh. Use the authorization component's role checks to conditionally render admin navigation. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Ensure the admin check using useIsCallerAdmin is properly connected to the authentication flow and that the AccessDeniedScreen is shown for non-admin users. Verify that the page correctly handles the transition from unauthenticated to authenticated admin state without requiring a manual refresh. Use the authorization component's admin permission checks. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
